# Toggle (Switch) — Designer Flexibility Test

> Gate 0 file — retroactively completed. All use-cases traced through
> toggle.tokens.css and toggle.css.

---

## Use-case 1: Full rebrand

A product switches its brand color from blue to teal. No component CSS changes.

```css
--color-brand-500: hsl(175, 80%, 40%);
/* + all other brand steps regenerated by palette engine */
```

Chain trace:
- `--color-brand-500` → `--switch-track-bg-on` (declared in tokens.css)
- `--switch-track-bg-on` → `--_sw-track-bg-on` (set by `[aria-checked="true"]` selector)
- `--_sw-track-bg-on` → `.switch__track { background-color }` in checked state
- Focus ring: `--focus-ring-color` → brand-500 → automatically matches

✅ — no gaps. Rebrand propagates through the color token chain automatically.

---

## Use-case 2: Global shape reset (all components become sharp)

A brand wants zero border radius everywhere. One token override.

```css
--radius-full: 0;
```

Chain trace:
- `--radius-full` → `--switch-track-radius` (default: `var(--radius-full)`)
- `--switch-track-radius` → `.switch__track { border-radius }`
- `--radius-full` → `--switch-thumb-radius` → `.switch__thumb { border-radius }`

✅ — both track and thumb become square. Note: a sharp toggle is an unusual design choice but is fully supported.

---

## Use-case 3: Density override (make base feel larger)

A product wants the `base` size to feel like `medium`.

```css
/* On a scoped container */
--switch-track-w-base: var(--switch-track-w-medium);
--switch-track-h-base: var(--switch-track-h-medium);
--switch-thumb-size-base: var(--switch-thumb-size-medium);
```

Chain trace:
- `--switch-track-w-base` → `--_sw-track-w` (set by `[data-size="base"]` selector)
- `--_sw-track-w` → `.switch__track { width }`
- `--switch-thumb-size-base` → `--_sw-thumb-size` → `.switch__thumb { width, height }`
- Travel: `--_sw-travel` = `calc(var(--_sw-track-w) - var(--_sw-track-h))` — recomputes automatically ✅

✅ — thumb travel recalculates because it is derived via `calc()` from internal vars. No hardcoded pixel travel values.

---

## Use-case 4: Dark mode (automatic, no extra rules)

System switches to `[data-theme="dark"]` on root.

Chain trace:
- `[data-theme="dark"]` → T1 token layer overrides `--color-brand-500`, `--color-neutral-200`, etc.
- `--switch-track-bg-on` → `--color-brand-500` (updated by dark mode) → track fill updates
- `--switch-track-bg-off` → `--color-neutral-200` (updated by dark mode) → unchecked fill updates
- `--switch-thumb-bg` → `--color-fixed-white` (FIXED token — does NOT flip in dark mode) ✅

✅ — toggle needs NO component-level `[data-theme="dark"]` block. The T1 color system handles all semantic tokens. Thumb uses `--color-fixed-white` so it stays white in both themes.

---

## Use-case 5: Custom role (new semantic color)

A product wants a "danger" variant toggle for destructive-action confirmation.

```css
.my-danger-toggle {
  --switch-track-bg-on:     var(--color-danger-500);
  --switch-track-border-on: var(--color-danger-600);
}
```

Chain trace:
- `--switch-track-bg-on` overridden on element →
- `[aria-checked="true"]` selector sets `--_sw-track-bg-on: var(--switch-track-bg-on)` →
- `.switch__track { background-color: var(--_sw-track-bg-on) }` renders danger red

⚠️ — hover/pressed states auto-shift by 1–2 steps using `--_sw-track-bg-on` as base BUT those shift values are hardcoded step offsets in the token defaults, not derived from the override. A complete custom role requires also overriding `--switch-track-bg-on-hover` and `--switch-track-bg-on-pressed`. Documented limitation; not a blocking gap for most usage.

---

## Use-case 6: Change track width without breaking thumb travel

Toggle track width can be adjusted while keeping the thumb proportional.

```css
/* Make the base toggle wider (e.g. for a labelled state inside the track) */
--switch-track-w-base: 56px;
```

Chain trace:
- `--switch-track-w-base` → `--_sw-track-w` → `.switch__track { width: 56px }`
- Travel: `calc(var(--_sw-track-w) - var(--_sw-track-h))` = `calc(56px - 24px)` = `32px` ✅
- Thumb does NOT change size — thumb size derives from `--switch-track-h-base`, not `--switch-track-w-base`

✅ — thumb travel is purely derived. Track width is freely adjustable.

---

## ✅ Flexibility review checklist (must all be checked before Gate 0 passes)

- [x] Rebrand use-case fully traced — no gaps
- [x] Shape reset use-case fully traced — no gaps
- [x] Density override use-case fully traced — no gaps
- [x] Dark mode use-case fully traced — confirms NO component-level dark block needed
- [x] Custom role use-case fully traced — limitation documented (hover/pressed need explicit overrides for full rebrand)
- [x] Component-specific use-case added (track width change) and traced — no gaps
- [x] Any gaps found: none blocking; one limitation noted in use-case 5
